subject: Icibemba
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Lumbulapo imibele ya Litilica yalembwa isano?
topics: Umutwe Unoono 3: Ubupusano na Ukupalana kwaba pakati ka Litilica
Muli uyu mutwe, abasambi balasambilila ubupusano na ukupalana
kwaba pakati ka Litilica yakulandafye na iyalembwa. Balantantika
